programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: Madre Luna

programme.title: Madre Luna

programme.title: Madre Luna

programme.title: Madre Luna

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a shopping spree through Somerset that ends at an auction in Woking. James thinks a pair of Staffordshire figures will attract big bids, despite some damage. Raj hopes the bidders will appreciate his experimental Moorcroft vase.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Raj Bisram are in the beautiful New Forest. James dives into buying in the village of Brockenhurst, but all bets are off when Raj catches up with him in the market town of Ringwood.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Raj Bisram set off in Cheshire. Raj hears why a group of daredevil playboys decided to drive their car in to the Savoy, and James learns why a pint in a pub played a vital role in verifying the quality of silver in 1773.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a Welsh road trip for Kate Bliss and Paul Laidlaw. Some fake currency and a leg of mutton could cause problems for our pair of antiquers at a Somerset auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Kate Bliss and Paul Laidlaw forage for antiques across the West Country in a stylish 1960s Volvo. Paul's fortunes rest on a treasure from Africa while Kate blows a very, very big horn.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw resorts to tank warfare to crush Kate Bliss's chances of profit. Kate finds out about a decisive naval confrontation while Paul heads to Southampton to discover how Britain's landscape has been mapped for generations.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Kate Bliss hope to capitalize on some risky buys. Paul believes a strange collection of medals will honor him with profits, but will a pricey three-figure gamble purchase pay off for Kate?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Kate Bliss and Paul Laidlaw's final trip sees them through Kent. At an incredible auction in Bury St. Edmunds, the Antiques Road Trip record profit is truly smashed, and when the gavel finally goes down one expert is left close to tears.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton are in the Scottish Borders with a '60s Jaguar. James resorts to a flashlight as he rummages in the dark for an occasional table while Christina hopes some silver-plated cutlery will serve up a profit.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton's are in the cold and snowy Trossachs. James investigates some ancient treasures in a Glasgow graveyard and farmer's wife Christina learns why it was the Scots who transformed arable farming.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton start in Levenshulme, Manchester. James has the unusual problem of having too much cash, while Christina struggles with her limited funds, deciding to gamble them on a worn toy train.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The seaside town of Southport in Merseyside is Christina Trevanion and James Braxton's next stop. Christina dibs her way to a purchase with a Scouting connection and James spends a vast amount of his cash on two Cantonese jardinières.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Whitley Bay, Christina Trevanion and James Braxton set off on their finale. Christina buys a Chinese silver bowl and James has found six Japanese porcelain teacups. After their buying spree, they head to Ayr for a memorable auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell is joined by new Road Tripper Arusha Irvine on a jaunt around Herefordshire's antique shops in a 1976 Triumph Stag. Phil's joined by Daphne, his dog, while Roo finds a 300-year-old example of Georgian glass.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team returns to Dyrham Park in Gloucestershire. They find an 18th Century court dress worth £10,000, a diamond, pearl, and ruby brooch, a gift given from the Queen Mother to her Head Chef in 1937, and a tin cup turns out to be a rare piece of silver.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael hosts a long-overdue visit to the Scottish capital of Edinburgh, where the team finds an ornate Russian cigarette case, a bizarre tourist's trinket depicting a dozen types of torture, and a lock of Beethoven's hair.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visits Wilton House near Salisbury. They find 200 typewriters, a suffragette doll dressed in clothes cut from women protestors prison uniforms, a ring worn by the daughter of Charles I in 1635, and an ornate table valued at £20 to £30,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team head for Cardiff. Amongst the treasures, they discover a boot sale for 10 pence and now valued at £700 to £1,000, a rare Prince of Wales tea caddy, and a dusty clock valued at up to £35,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael introduces a special edition from the lavishly decorated interior of Cardiff Castle. Featured items are an African witch doctor's ceremonial stick, a schoolboy's exercise book from 1745, and a Scandinavian drinking tankard valued at £12,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit King's College, Cambridge. The intriguing finds are a letter from Florence Nightingale, the racing silk of a famous jockey, a collection of old wedding photographs, and an Art Deco diamond brooch found in wartime London.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A return visit to Kings College, Cambridge is where the team finds a machine gun from World War One, a papal portrait rescued from the bottom of a river, and a set of rare maps recording America's early settlement valued at £10,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow team set up camp at Tyntesfield House near Bristol. Amongst the treasures brought for valuation are an elegant grape holder made from silver, a cabinet of rare microscope slides, and a ruby and diamond brooch valued at £30,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow visits the Outer Hebrides as Michael and the team head for Stornoway on the island of Lewis. They assess some gruesome medical instruments, a table made from shipwreck salvage, and a painting bought for a song is valued at £20,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit the winner of the first BBC series of Restoration, the Victoria Baths in Manchester. They are presented with an Art Deco cigarette case, a 'shock therapy machine,' and an ornate pedestal that had been abandoned in a garage.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The special Michael marks the 200th anniversary of the Battle of Trafalgar. Assessed items are ornately decorated ostrich eggs carved by a member of the ship's crew and a box made out of debris taken from the vessel in the battle's aftermath.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team head to Abergavenny in Wales, where a strange coincidence unites two Beatles collectors. Other items brought to light are carved whalebone and a macabre pottery model of a famous Victorian murder scene.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit Ipswich. Amongst the items viewed are a collection of pre-historic spearheads, an early American flag, a highly valuable silver tankard, and a pair of spectacles worn by Napoleon, as well as a collection of 5,000 Dinky toys.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit Dartington Hall near Totnes in Devon, where they examine a set of royal cuff links, a letter from Admiral Nelson, and a valuable collection of silver that surprised parishioners when found in the back of the village church.

programme.desc: Las víctimas en California hacen que la UAC busque a un sospechoso que puede haber sido testigo de abuso cuando era niño.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un reservista naval de alta seguridad es encontrado muerto. Gibbs colabora con la Dra. Samantha Ryan de PsyOps para descubrir la verdad detrás del posible suicidio. Mientras tanto, DiNozzo discute con contabilidad tras ver el salario de McGee.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de un suboficial principal, creyendo que está relacionado con un traficante de armas internacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El secretario de la Marina asigna a Gibbs a trabajar con la Dra. Samantha Ryan después de que información secreta haya sido filtrada desde adentro.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El cuñado del director Vance es el principal sospechoso cuando Gibbs y el equipo de NCIS investigan el asesinato de un marinero.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC regresa a sus orígenes cuando miran uno de los viejos casos de Rossi y Gideon para localizar a un asesino que se escapó.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 10/28/2017. Miners want to drill for billions of dollars worth of copper and gold beneath the pristine wilderness of America’s last wild frontier but fishermen say the world’s last great salmon run could be jeopardized.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 11/04/2017. Conservationists turn killers in this battle to turn back time by eradicating mammal invaders threatening the islands’ unique ecosystem.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/14/2016. Homeland Security Investigations conducts an elaborate undercover sting operation to stop an illegal arms dealer.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/21/2016. After the Taliban refused to release international aid workers being held hostage in Afghanistan, the CIA, Joint Special Operations Command, and a Taliban double agent race against time to rescue them.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/28/2016. In 2004, the FBI and Naval Criminal Investigative Service needed to catch an engineer who had been stealing U.S. Navy secrets for the Chinese government.

programme.title: Declassified

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer involved in a fight. A brazen female driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving, she is eventually handcuffed but not without a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it. A talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details. A couple calls for help when they find an alligator in their yard.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover officers set up a sting operation to nab people looking to buy drugs. A woman tries to conceal drugs in her mouth. Then a repeat offender who has a history of threatening officers with a tainted needle is arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The passenger of a fleeing driver makes his own getaway, a motorcyclist in a high-speed pursuit narrowly misses a car, and police respond to a disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman bites both the arresting officer and a store manager after getting caught stealing beer. The passenger of a suspicious vehicle is caught attempting to hide drugs in the seat. Police respond to a domestic abuse call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man who threatened his neighbors redirects his anger toward the deputies, and a driver in crisis puts the lives of others on the line.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself. While on patrol officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who explains to officers that he’s camping. It takes several officers to take down a deranged naked man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems. Deputies sympathize with a woman who’s been put through the wringer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest an uncooperative man with an outstanding warrant, discover marijuana paraphernalia during a traffic stop and investigate a dispute involving a pellet gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects lead Officers on a high speed pursuit. An Officer discovers two men have warrants after a traffic stop. A man hides from the police after a domesitc disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers step in when a man's erratic behavior sparks concern in a neighborhood, and a wanted suspect is convinced an officer told him to take off on his bicycle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stabbing victim has his throat slashed while waiting for his wife. A man is shocked to learn that his rental box truck was reported stolen. Spice is found in a nervous passenger's purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Narcotics officers end up in a foot chase during a buy-bust operation. Officers respond to a dispute with a tow truck driver at a strip club. The odor of marijuana on a traffic stop leads to a citation for the cooperative driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is questioned for assaulting a woman on a train. A man is arrested for burglarizing a casino, he initially denies the charges but surveillance footage corroborates. A father kicks his son out of the house after his drinking becomes problematic.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police help a man evacuate a house fire, a high-speed chase yields only minor infractions, and an officer interrogates a parolee with meth in his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers split up to interrogate two men suspected of stealing a pick-up truck, a motorist tries to ditch a bag of meth, and police discover a bunch of syringes in a vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues suspects for reckless driving, police respond to the armed robbery of a pizza delivery driver, and a deputy detects a unique scent during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs process clues after a murder at a poultry manufacturing plant, the evidence leads them to the home of a man who collects miniature trains and other miniature paraphernalia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine's testimony in court is not enough to convict a killer suspected of murdering his own mother. Adam Novak, with whom Catherine had a brief romantic encounter, is the lawyer who represents the killer and secures his freedom.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The lead suspect for the high-profile murder of anti-drug crusading assemblyman Danilo Zamesca is Thomas Simon, the west coast's biggest drug supplier.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Catherine and Keppler begin to investigate the murder of a teen-aged Jane Doe, both agree that the killer, who was meticulous in removing evidence from the body and its surrounding area, is likely a repeat offender.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: Sólo una noche
programme.desc: La historia de un matrimonio que se enfrenta a la tentación que puede decidir su futuro cuando se encuentran separados durante una sola noche.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: El informante

programme.title: Sobredosis
programme.desc: Dos policías con puntos de vista y métodos opuestos se ven obligados a trabajar juntos para resolver un sangriento atropello que puede estar relacionado con el asesinato de dos adolescentes.

programme.desc: El ex amante de un sospechoso se presenta con una fantástica historia de asesinato, mutilación y cremación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesino probablemente esperaba cubrir sus huellas escenificando la escena del crimen. Pero los investigadores descubrieron el intento casi de inmediato y recurrieron a la ciencia forense para saber qué sucedió esa noche realmente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asistente del gerente de una carnicería de Florida es apuñalado hasta la muerte. Parece ser un robo que salió mal, pero una huella sangrienta revela que él conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trampa para turistas
programme.desc: En 1993, el estado de Florida era conocido por algo más que Disney World. La atención mundial se centró en una serie de robos dirigidos a turistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un choque mortal en 1983 causado por el equipo de seguridad de la reina de Inglaterra durante una visita a California.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up. The girls better start looking good because uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show are on the agenda. Surprises continue when two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves, stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko. Kitty Carter rocks a few of the candidate's worlds. Cameos give Kelli & Judy a fresh perspective on the girls. At Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp is coming to an end. Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake. Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Squad announcement is bittersweet as some favorites go home. The team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting. Game Day is when dreams come true!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented women converge on AT&T Stadium to start the hardest audition process in professional sports, trying out for a coveted spot on the most famous NFL cheerleading squad in the world, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad goes on an appearance to support pop music star, Demi Lovato. The ladies learn the entrance to the famed pre-game dance. It's a make or break moment. If a woman can't learn it quickly it might be her last night.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With two suspended vets, the team must re-block their formations for their Hall Of Fame performance. New vets step up as a new point of the triangle is named. The rookie candidates try to get their footing during this never seen before rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 23 veterans travel to Canton, Ohio to perform at Jerry Jones' induction to the Pro Football Hall of Fame. All eyes are watching as the DCC perform for the NFL elite.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Iceman: Mummy From the Stone Age
programme.desc: The discovery of a 5,000-year-old male mummy in the Austrian Alps has enabled scientists to re-create a vanished world.

programme.title: Wildlife on One
programme.desc: Fossil remains serve as clues in discovering how prehistoric flying creatures lived.

programme.title: Wildlife on One
programme.desc: A look at extraordinary animals around the world, emphasising their unpredictable behaviour.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts visits the Arabian Desert to find clues as to how a tiny group left the African continent around 70,000 years ago.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts' journey continues into Asia in a quest to find out how early hunter-gatherers survived in the inhospitable Arctic region of Northern Siberia. Alice meets the nomadic Evenki people.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Göbeklitepe ruins discovered in Turkey's history goes back 12,000 years. How and in what way did the descendants of the Neanderthals, the Aztecs of Europe, disappear with the arrival of Homo sapiens?

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts looks at our ancestors' seemingly impossible journey to Australia. Miraculously preserved footprints and very old human fossils buried in the outback suggest a mystery: that humans reached Australia almost before anywhere else.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: How did Stone Age people reach North and South America? Dr Alice Roberts discovers evidence for an ancient corridor through the Canadian ice sheet that may have allowed those first people through.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor is free to roam space and time again, but having planned to visit Metebelis Three, the Doctor and Jo actually find themselves stowaways aboard a ship in the 1920s, heading for Bombay.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo realise that they are actually trapped in a loop on a miniaturised version of Earth in which the other ship passengers endlessly repeat their actions.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: Having escaped from the ship, the Doctor and Jo find themselves stuck inside the workings of a giant machine. Can they find their way out?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor is reunited with the TARDIS and now full size, but Jo is still trapped within the machine. When the Doctor meets the operators of the Scope he learms that Jo is in grave danger.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo land on a spaceship in the far future as it is attacked by Ogrons, which the human crew see as Draconians. The Doctor and Jo are taken to Earth as spies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: Neither the humans nor the Draconians are willing to believe the Doctor and Jo's story that someone is deliberately attempting to provoke a war between Earth and Draconia.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: Accused of being a spy, the Doctor is sentenced to imprisonment on the Moon while Jo is taken into the custody of an old enemy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo are the Master's prisoners. In a bid to escape, the Doctor makes a dangerous spacewalk.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: On Draconia, the Doctor reveals the Master's plan to provoke war to the Draconian Emperor. But the Master escapes, taking Jo as a hostage.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: The Doctor leads a mission to the Ogron home world to apprehend the Master and rescue Jo. But the Master is in league with some old enemies of the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: Injured by an Orgron gun, the Doctor asks the Time Lords to send the TARDIS after the Daleks. Leaving him asleep, Jo goes to explore the planet Spirodon.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor recovers from his coma and befriends a Thal expedition but is captured by the Daleks and taken to their base. Then a second Thal expedition arrives with terrible news.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: In Dalek city, the Doctor breaks out of his prison cell and joins forces with the Thals. With the Daleks in pursuit, the Doctor is forced to improvise a daring escape plan.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor and the Thals escape from the Dalek city and the Doctor is delighted to find that Jo is alive. The Daleks are preparing a deadly bacteria to kill all life on the planet.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: Desperate to prevent the Daleks from releasing their plague, the Doctor, Jo and the Thals infiltrate the Dalek base. But the Daleks detect the intruders!

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: A force of ten thousand Daleks are coming to life below the surface of Spiridon. The Doctor and the Thals must find a way to defeat the Daleks before they invade the galaxy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: In Wales, a dead miner is found glowing green. UNIT investigates and Jo empathizes with the environmentalism of Cliff Jones who is opposing the pollution from Global Chemicals.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: Investigating the old mine workings, Jo and the miner, Bert, become trapped beneath the surface when the lift is sabotaged. Bert touches some green slime and becomes infected.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo discover the mine’s terrible secret. Global Chemicals’ managing director, Stevens is determined that they won’t live to reveal what they have learnt.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: The Brigadier attempts to seal the giant maggots in the mine with explosives, but this only results in the creatures burrowing to the surface.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: Captain Mike Yates is taken over by the supercomputer, BOSS and ordered to kill the Doctor. Cliff and Jo are trapped by the maggots as UNIT launch their attack.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: Cliff is dying, and maggots are on the verge of transforming into giant flying insects. Time is running out for the Doctor as BOSS launches its plan for world domination.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time Warrior
programme.desc: A group of scientists are kidnapped by an alien from the past.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time Warrior
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that the alien is a Sontaran warrior called Linx.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time Warrior
programme.desc: Linx is providing advanced weaponry to Irongron and his men.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time Warrior

programme.title: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold, Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: From the Corcovado National Park, described by National Geographic as "the most biodiverse site on the planet", researchers and conservationists follow the so-called "green corridors" in search of key species.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Croatia - Kvarner
programme.desc: Overcoming a turbulent past, this is where tourism and the Croatian language were written. Full of islands, coastal areas, and mountaintops, this rich landscape was settled by the wealthy.

programme.title: Wonders of the Arctic
programme.desc: Our ongoing quest to explore and come to terms with the Arctic is presented in the context of the crucial role that ice plays in the north. It is the underpinning of the ecosystem, the foundation upon which the animals and plants of the north depend.

programme.title: EXTRAORDINARY HUMANS
programme.desc: Rick Smith, known for his feats involving the throwing of playing cards. Continuing his quest, Thom meets Brian Jackson with his unique lung power, inflating rubber hot water bottles until they explode.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 1
programme.desc: Luego de una visita sorpresa de familiares, los concursantes restantes deberán diseñar sus propios restaurantes y jerarquías para el servicio final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: The Mertzes get a pair of new tenants. Sam and Nancy Johnson are from Texas and reportedly have inside knowledge of a certain oil stock that is about to shoot through the roof. Lucy and Ethel are excited by the prospect, but Fred and Ricky have doubts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to try a new look, despite her husband Ricky's objections. She borrows a black wig from her hairdresser Roberta, who tells Lucy it makes her look like a whole different person. With that in mind, Lucy decides to play a little trick on Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky books a two-month summer job in Maine and decides to take Lucy and Little Ricky. For the summer, they want to sublet their apartment at a profit, but their friends and landlords, the Mertzes, are not in favor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feigns a crisis to test Ricky's love after hearing a story about a woman whose husband ignored her pleas for help while being robbed—she assumes Ricky would turn his back on her too.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy plays Cupid and tries to bag a bachelor for a husband-hungry girlfriend. Lucy organizes an evening to show her unmarried friends, Dorothy and Sam, how wonderful marriage is.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Hey Arnold! The Movie
programme.desc: A heartless industrialist has an evil plan: to level Arnold's neighborhood and build a huge shopping mall. With time running out, someone needs to save the day. And that someone is Arnold.

programme.title: Barnyard
programme.desc: Wild, wacky and “udderly” hilarious, here’s a herd of animated pranksters that’ll keep you laughing out loud!

programme.title: The Wild Thornberrys Movie
programme.desc: In the heart of Africa, The Thornberrys are filming their action-packed wildlife show. They’re ready for anything with a fully-equipped off-road vehicle and a daughter who has a secret gift.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! The Movie

programme.title: Barnyard

programme.title: Astro Boy
programme.desc: In futuristic Metro City, scientist Tenma (voiced by Nicolas Cage) creates an amazing robot boy with hidden talents unlike anything you've ever seen.

programme.title: Escape from Planet Earth
programme.desc: When a hero astronaut from the blue-alien planet Baab (Brendan Fraser) gets trapped on a notoriously dangerous planet called Earth, his risk-averse brother (Rob Corddry) must save him.

programme.title: Space Chimps
programme.desc: Space Chimps is an intergalactic comedy that highlights the antics of astronaut chimps on a mission in space, where they demonstrate as much of 'the wrong stuff' as 'the right stuff.'

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: While everyone prepares for a wonderful Christmas lunch, Zac learns he's qualified for a winter snowboard competition and they need volunteers! This pulls everyone apart and puts both their first Christmas together and feeding the community at risk.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's Harl Hubbs Day and Harl decides to help the whole city but quickly discovers he wasn't prepared for Harl mania! Billy's mother, Ann, accepts a junkyard race challenge against the city's street racing legend, Tread Octane.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: We pull back the curtain to see how Firemen Bob and Clemmons retrieve the bizarre requests of Chief Freya during a typical emergency. It's an old west showdown when a new adversary rolls into town.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Fendrich organizes a charity as a distraction while he attempts to steal the city deed. Sinclair gathers antiheroes to stop him. Freya is one credit short of graduating from the fire academy and is suspended as Fire Chief.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Mayor Fleck is running for re-election against R E Fendrich who will stop at nothing to win to use his new power to defeat Sinclair once and for all. When Duke loses his memory, Snake Rattler tricks him into believing he's Snake's criminal henchman.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: When Rooky discovers it's Chief Wheeler's birthday, she is determined to make it memorable. During the dedication ceremony of the city's deep-sea vessel to honor Duke, Freya, and Harl, the ship is accidentally set adrift.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: When the mythical ocean monster, the Quacken, is sighted off the coast, famed adventurer Jessica Sharpe vows to capture it. Rooky and Grizzled go undercover aboard the Guardian of the Oceans in search of a lost pirate treasure.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon travels back in time in order to undo the past and rid the Ninja from the future, the Ninja follow him and try to stop him by using the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon’s Mega-Weapon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody’s in town. Then, they hear…laughter?!

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: We finally REVEAL that Jestro has given the Book of Betrayal to…Clay. He tells Clay what it is and how Mike Knight used it. And it seems that the Book of Monsters believed it to be the final ingredient in some ‘Master Plan.”

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud and is raising an army of lightning-infused Stone Monsters.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vehicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounter the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick?

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to “store” the Forbidden Power in a secret location

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: The NEXO KNIGHTS have their powerful shields stolen by Robot Hoodlum and his Merry Mechs. And something is coming to life in the Petrified forest, and it doesn't like knights. Can the NEXO KNIGHTS deal with this without their shields?

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Villagers are being enslaved to dig out three ancient warriors whom the Cloud of Monstrox wants to bring back to life. Can the NEXO KNIGHTS make their COMBO NEXO Powers work inside a mountain?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en emocionantes aventuras de aprendizaje! Desde medirse hasta divertirse en la granja, la construcción de formas, revisiones oculares, animales del mundo y sorprender a mamá y papá, ¡es un día de descubrimientos y alegría!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Súbete a bordo de un viaje lleno de diversión y risas mientras Little Angel se adentra en una aventura.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en una emocionante aventura de aprendizaje y exploración. Desde descubrir sabores hasta dominar movimientos de karate, cada aventura está llena de risas, descubrimientos y valiosas lecciones que inspiran la curiosidad.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels y disfruta de grandes risas, lecciones y momentos conmovedores mientras crecen.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Sumérgete en la diversión veraniega con Little Angel! Desde compartir en el parque hasta emocionantes visitas al parque acuático, nadar, bailar, acampar, días de playa y aventuras junto al lago, ¡es un verano lleno de alegría y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Bienvenido al mundo de los pequeños modales, donde los Little Angels enseñarán valiosas lecciones de amabilidad, empatía y buenos modales.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Embárcate en un día lleno de alegría junto a Little Angel y sus amigos! Desde expresar su amor por mamá hasta aventuras con juguetes, ¡únete a este viaje lleno de diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un día lleno de emoción y asombro. Desde aprender el baile de Baby Shark hasta explorar la magia de mezclar colores, jugar y descubrir sorpresas, ¡es un viaje de diversión y descubrimiento que te dejará sonriendo!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Explora la seguridad con Little Angel! Desde el patio de recreo hasta la los primeros auxilios, pasando por la hora de la siesta y el cuidado de la piel. Será un viaje lleno de diversión para mantenerte a salvo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en una divertida fiesta familiar, donde se embarcan en una serie de aventuras que celebran las alegrías de la unión y el aprendizaje.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para divertirte al aire libre! Desde payasadas en el patio hasta patinaje, familias de dedos, seguridad en la cama, concientización sobre accidentes y faltar a clase, ¡un día de juegos y seguridad!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a la aventura de aprendizaje de Little Angel! Desde explorar profesiones hasta comprender los sentidos, la alimentación sana, la anatomía y las visitas al médico, ¡cada paso es un descubrimiento de conocimiento y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus fiestas de juegos, donde descubren la alegría de ayudar y marcar la diferencia, demostrando que incluso los actos de bondad más pequeños pueden tener un gran impacto.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en las encantadoras melodías que inspiran dulces sueños y sonrisas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un viaje lleno de diversión en el que aprenderás a compartir, lo que potenciará la empatía y el sentimiento de cuidado hacia los demás.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus aventuras llenas de risas y lecciones de vida. Aprenden a tomar decisiones saludables y la alegría de ayudar.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en un viaje en el que atraviesan situaciones inesperadas con valentía y creatividad, demostrando que incluso los pequeños retos pueden superarse con un poco de ayuda de los amigos.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para un armonioso viaje con los Little Angels mientras se sumergen en el mundo de las emociones. Con una melodía pegadiza y un poco de magia, convierten las lágrimas en sonrisas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel en un día de diversión y aprendizaje! Desde sorpresas hasta bailar, clases de ballet, higiene dental, tareas domésticas, cuidado del estómago y observar estrellas, ¡es una aventura de risas y descubrimientos!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata concocts an extravagant plan to finally capture Lupin by luring him in with a fake meteor made from 6 tons of pure gold. Low and behold, his plan backfires and Lupin and his gang make off with the meteor.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin sneaks into an old castle to steal a collection of priceless angel paintings, owned by the late Malcolm Hurst. Inside the castle, Lupin meets a mysterious girl named Flora, who knows the whereabouts of the angel paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are out at sea attempting to retrieve the gold inside a sunken pirate ship. However, a female pirate gang interrupts their retrieval mission and both parties leave empty-handed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in South Africa to receive a nautical chart from a retired Nazi that shows the location of a sunken Nazi treasure. However, two young German soldiers interrupt the exchange and a skirmish ensues.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in the small city of San Pico in Central America. However, the city was in the midst of a war between the Government Forces and the Guerilla Army. Leading the Guerilla Army is Jigen's old army pal, Giranco.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Unsurprisingly, Fujiko had once betrayed her heist partner Garb, known as the Grim Reaper, and left him for dead. Garb, who has seemingly returned from the dead, is determined to kill Fujiko and has an uncanny ability to dodge bullets with ease.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious cult that idolizes a solid gold Virgin Mary statue abducts Fujiko and they're planning to burn her at the stake as a witch. However, her kidnapper and the cult leader look vaguely familiar to Lupin. Have they crossed paths before?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has a horrible case of athlete's foot and visits Dr. Budweiser, who is also a cloning expert, for treatment. The doctor takes a sample of Lupin's skin under the guise of treating his Athlete's foot, but the doctor has another plan up his sleeve.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious message appears in the newspaper and Lupin takes it as a sign from this late grandfather, Lupin I, to reclaim his diamond keepsake.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games

programme.desc: Henrik Durvard has taken over the country of Lombuanada by a military coup, and holds the natives in terror. He has obtained a diamond from the native miners, and the IMF is assigned to take it away from him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An imprisoned member of the Nazi party, Herbert Raynor, is released from prison and is being flown to Puerto Huberra in South America, along with other Nazis.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A former prison guard, Sefra, has acquired a supply of cesium 138, which explodes at temperatures above 70 degrees.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The team must break a Communist assassin who killed a U.S. Senator.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Miklos Klaar, an Iron Curtain filmmaker, has film of American soldiers and plans to edit it into an atrocity movie to discredit the U.S.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Prime Minister Larya of Svardia is working to establish democracy, but is unaware that his personal protege, Deputy Premier Pavel, plans to set up a dictatorship.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Enemy operative Kiri has kidnapped U.S. envoy Carl Wilson and has an imposter, Gort, who is impersonating him to discredit a U.S. trade agreement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF team must rescue a U.S. intelligence operative who has top-secret military plans on a microcircuit chip.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An American intelligence officer, Hughes, has defected to the enemy with the only copy of an encoded top-secret message.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The team must trick a crooked investment promoter into endorsing $80 million in stolen stocks and then getting them back from him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A grave threat to national security is posed when an enemy agent (Albert Paulsen) kidnaps two of the three key scientists who collectively know the formula for the cobalt bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force matches wits with a hijacker and a disloyal prison commandant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is dispatched to Berlin's East Zone.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF races against time to convince the president (Pernell Roberts) of a small country that his chief of secret police plans to overthrow the government and seize power.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Francois Clemmons stops by and soaks his feet. King Friday turns down his son's offer to take a leisurely walk. Learning that a delivery is for Lady Elaine's soap opera, King Friday storms off at the lack of work in the Neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers takes out a wooden block and talks about when he was young and would use a block to pretend he was shaving. At Negri's Music Shop, mandolinist Peter Ostroushko sings a Ukrainian lullaby.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers blows some bubbles and calls a plumber because the water in his house isn't working.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is concerned when he sees a small toy Trolley on the tracks. Robert Troll picks it up and tells the prince that the real Trolley is playing at Daniel's clock. Daniel shares that the Trolley can do some "magical things."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Jim West, a shadow artist, creates silhouettes of various animals. King Friday asks Robert Troll to help him by return some shadows that were left behind at the castle by various Neighbors.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a painting of the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mime artist Motoko demonstrates her talents by miming various activities. Trolley shows baby pictures of Prince Tuesday, King Friday and Lady Aberlin.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers says that everything in the world is unique: "Whenever you see somebody, even somebody in a mirror, you know that that's the only one there is."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: World-famous violinist Itzhak Perlman joins Mister Rogers in a rehearsal room and shares some of his music, as well as some of his feelings about dealing with polio.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride a bus and notice people wearing hats. Mayor Maggie wears a three-cornered hat and offers one to Queen Sara and King Friday. The King declares that everyone in the Neighborhood must wear these hats.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bob Trow picks up the Bob Dog costume from Mister Rogers. Handyman Negri provides both royal birds with a three-cornered hat. Quickly finding a hat to fit Bob Dog, however, proves to be a bit more difficult.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces Mr. Morrison, who is playing the organ. Neighbor Aber says that anytime someone says anything about three-cornered hats, Lady Elaine squirts them with her hose.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a pair of crutches and a cast. He shows how to walk with crutches. King Friday continues to insist that everyone wear a "three-cornered one." Betty Okonak Templeton finds a loophole in King Friday's command.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the Colonial Williamsburg Millinery Shop, Mister Rogers wears 18th century clothing. Mayor Maggie informs King Friday that those in Westwood are planning to take off their three-cornered hats.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a map of the world and explains that the blue part of the map is water and the rest is land. Mr. McFeely stops at the tree with a delivery for Cousin Mary. Dan Kamin arrives as a mime and tries to help Mr. McFeely.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with paramedics who show him an ambulance and some of the equipment they use.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Marilyn Barnett go to see her students play basketball in wheelchairs. Lady Elaine Fairchilde and cousin Mary Owl find a piece of paper that mentions a secret tunnel.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a piece of plastic pipe and talks about tunnels. Mr. McFeely shows up with a video of him driving his car through a car wash. Cousin Mary Owl believes a tunnel may exist under Henrietta Pussycat's and X the Owl's tree.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Chuck Aber demonstrates a small backhoe. Lady Aberlin has a fan, a flashlight and a measuring tape for the owls to use when they go into the tunnel. Mr. McFeely shares a video about how people make tortilla chips.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows his control box that makes Trolley go fast and slow. Trolley shows King Friday and Mayor Maggie how it can go very fast and very slow. Neighbor Aber and Mayor Maggie discuss how to get Trolley to slow down.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reflects on a day when he went roller skating with his friend Stephen Lee. Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about how people make roller skates. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, the Trolley is still moving very quickly.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers has a gift for Mr. McFeely -- the Speedy Delivery Alphabet Book. Lady Aberlin and Prince Tuesday try to cheer up Daniel Tiger who is sad because he cannot say the alphabet as quickly as Prince Tuesday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Chainey Umphrey and sees a gymnastics demonstration. Lady Aberlin and Neighbor Aber have built a feathered contraption over the Trolley tracks to help them catch the speeding Trolley. Lady Elaine falls on the feathers.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a toy crane. When he lifts objects slowly, the crane works perfectly. Neighbor Aber and Corney use a crane to catch the Trolley. Trolley's controls are adjusted back to normal.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Maggie Stewart invites Mister Rogers to her home where she and Chef Brockett are making bread pudding for a family reunion. Prince Tuesday tells Chef Brockett he doesn't like what he sees in the mirror. Chef Brockett tells the King.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
